sentences.english: I usually just stay home and catch up on sleep.
Maybe watch a movie or read a book.
sentences.korean: 영화를 보거나 책을 읽을 수도 있고요.

sentences.english: I like to go hiking on the weekends, weather permitting.
sentences.korean: 주말에 등산 가는 걸 좋아해요, 날씨가 허락하면요.

sentences.english: There's a great trail near my house that I really enjoy.
sentences.korean: 집 근처에 정말 좋은 등산로가 있어요.

sentences.english: I spend my weekends with my kids at the park.
They have so much energy that I need to tire them out.
sentences.korean: 에너지가 너무 넘쳐서 지치게 해야 해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
